# Prompt Pack Patterns

## Image Prompt Template
`<style>, manhwa panel, <setting>, mood <mood>, dynamic framing, clean lineart, dramatic lighting, high detail, no text bubbles`

## Video Prompt Template
`<style>, cinematic storyboard shot, <setting>, mood <mood>, subtle camera push-in, parallax-ready composition, 2.5D depth layers`

## Negative Prompt Baseline
- extra limbs
- low detail
- watermark
- logo
- text
- distorted eyes/hands

## Cast Locking Tokens
Maintain per-character token bundle in packet metadata:
- character_id
- lora_name
- lora_weight
- reference_image
- pose_preset
- seed_band
